subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Husayn, thou who sharest the name of this lowly servant, draw nigh, draw nigh, that together we may become confederates and confidants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالحسین ای همنام این عبد حقیر بیا بیا تا هر دو همدست شویم و همراز و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
